10]

Results

[edit]
Main card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight Tom Aspinall (c) vs. Ciryl Gane NC (accidental eye poke) 1 4:35 [a]
Women's Strawweight Mackenzie Dern def. Virna Jandiroba Decision (unanimous) (48–47, 48–47, 49–46) 5 5:00 [b]
Bantamweight Umar Nurmagomedov def. Mario Bautista Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Heavyweight Alexander Volkov def. Jailton Almeida Decision (split) (28–29, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight Azamat Murzakanov def. Aleksandar Rakić TKO (punches) 1 3:11
Preliminary card (ESPN+ / Disney+ / FX)
Lightweight Quillan Salkilld def. Nasrat Haqparast KO (head kick) 1 2:30
Middleweight Ikram Aliskerov def. Park Jun-yong Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 30–27) 3 5:00
Lightweight Ľudovít Klein def. Mateusz Rębecki Decision (majority) (29–28, 28–27, 28–28) 3 5:00
Heavyweight Valter Walker def. Louie Sutherland Submission (heel hook) 1 1:24
Catchweight (147 lb) Nathaniel Wood def. Jose Miguel Delgado Decision (unanimous) (29–28, 29–28, 29–28) 3 5:00
Heavyweight Hamdy Abdelwahab def. Chris Barnett Decision (unanimous) (29–26, 29–27, 29–27) 3 5:00 [c]
Catchweight (129 lb) Mitch Raposo def. Azat Maksum Decision (unanimous) (30–26, 29–27, 29–27) 3 5:00 [d]
Women's Strawweight Mizuki Inoue def. Jaqueline Amorim Decision (unanimous) (30–27, 30–27, 29–28) 3 5:00
  1. ^ For the UFC Heavyweight Championship. Accidental eye poke rendered Aspinall unable to continue.
  2. ^ For the vacant UFC Women's Strawweight Championship.
  3. ^ Abdelwahab was deducted one point in round 1 due to an illegal elbow to back of the head.
  4. ^ Maksum was deducted one point in round 3 due to grabbing the fence.

[11]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.[12]

  • Fight of the Night: Ľudovít Klein vs. Mateusz Rębecki
  • Performance of the Night: Quillan Salkilld and Valter Walker
